description: Create diagram illustrating the TreeGrafter family-vs-subfamily annotation error for NaPMT3
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Create a summary diagram of the TreeGrafter error
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 8))
ax.axis('off')
ax.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax.set_ylim(0, 10)

# Title
ax.text(5, 9.7, 'TreeGrafter Family-vs-Subfamily Annotation Error', fontsize=14, 
        fontweight='bold', ha='center', va='top')
ax.text(5, 9.3, 'PANTHER Family PTHR11558: SPERMIDINE/SPERMINE SYNTHASE', fontsize=11,
        ha='center', va='top', style='italic', color='navy')

# Draw family tree
# Family root
ax.annotate('', xy=(5, 8.2), xytext=(5, 8.8),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='-', color='black', lw=2))

# Branch to SPDS subfamily
ax.annotate('', xy=(2.5, 7.2), xytext=(5, 8.2),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='-', color='black', lw=2))

# Branch to PMT subfamily  
ax.annotate('', xy=(7.5, 7.2), xytext=(5, 8.2),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='-', color='black', lw=2))

# Family node
ax.add_patch(plt.Circle((5, 8.5), 0.3, color='lightblue', ec='navy', lw=2))
ax.text(5, 8.5, 'Family\nNode', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')

# SPDS subfamily box
rect1 = plt.Rectangle((1, 5.8), 3, 1.4, facecolor='#FFE0E0', edgecolor='darkred', lw=2, 
                        linestyle='-', zorder=2)
ax.add_patch(rect1)
ax.text(2.5, 7.0, 'SF11: SPERMIDINE SYNTHASE', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', 
        ha='center', va='top', color='darkred')
ax.text(2.5, 6.5, 'EC 2.5.1.16\nAminopropyl transfer\nCofactor: dcSAM', fontsize=8,
        ha='center', va='center', color='darkred')
ax.text(2.5, 6.0, 'GO:0004766 ✓ CORRECT', fontsize=8, ha='center', va='center',
        fontweight='bold', color='darkred',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#FFCCCC', edgecolor='darkred'))

# PMT subfamily box
rect2 = plt.Rectangle((6, 5.8), 3, 1.4, facecolor='#E0FFE0', edgecolor='darkgreen', lw=2,
                        linestyle='-', zorder=2)
ax.add_patch(rect2)
ax.text(7.5, 7.0, 'SF53: PUTRESCINE N-METHYLTRANSFERASE', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold',
        ha='center', va='top', color='darkgreen')
ax.text(7.5, 6.5, 'EC 2.1.1.53\nMethyl transfer\nCofactor: SAM', fontsize=8,
        ha='center', va='center', color='darkgreen')
ax.text(7.5, 6.0, 'GO:0030750 ✓ CORRECT', fontsize=8, ha='center', va='center',
        fontweight='bold', color='darkgreen',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#CCFFCC', edgecolor='darkgreen'))

# NaPMT3 protein (in PMT subfamily)
ax.annotate('', xy=(7.5, 4.5), xytext=(7.5, 5.8),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='darkgreen', lw=2))

rect3 = plt.Rectangle((5.8, 3.5), 3.4, 1.0, facecolor='#90EE90', edgecolor='darkgreen', lw=3,
                        zorder=2)
ax.add_patch(rect3)
ax.text(7.5, 4.2, 'NaPMT3 (A0A314LG79)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold',
        ha='center', va='top', color='darkgreen')
ax.text(7.5, 3.7, 'Nicotiana attenuata - Putrescine N-methyltransferase 3',
        fontsize=8, ha='center', va='center', color='darkgreen')

# Error annotation - TreeGrafter propagated from family node
ax.annotate('TreeGrafter ERROR:\nPropagated GO:0004766\n(spermidine synthase activity)\nfrom FAMILY-level node',
            xy=(6.3, 4.0), xytext=(2.5, 4.5),
            fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='red', ha='center',
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=2.5, linestyle='--'),
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.4', facecolor='#FFDDDD', edgecolor='red', lw=2))

# Correct annotation
ax.text(7.5, 3.0, '✓ Should be: GO:0030750 (putrescine N-methyltransferase activity)',
        fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', ha='center', color='darkgreen',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#CCFFCC', edgecolor='darkgreen', lw=2))

# Evidence summary box
ax.text(5, 2.2, 'Evidence Summary', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', ha='center')
evidence_text = (
    '• PANTHER subfamily: SF53 (PMT), not SF11 (SPDS)\n'
    '• InterPro: matches IPR025803 (PMT-specific), not IPR030668 (SPDS-specific)\n'
    '• PROSITE: matches PS51615 (SAM_MT_PUTRESCINE)\n'
    '• Sequence: 99.5% similar to NaPMT1, only 12.5% to HsSPDS\n'
    '• Literature: PMT evolved from SPDS but has different catalysis (Junker et al. 2013)'
)
ax.text(5, 1.7, evidence_text, fontsize=8, ha='center', va='top', fontfamily='sans-serif',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.5', facecolor='lightyellow', edgecolor='orange', lw=1))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('treegrafter_error_diagram.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: treegrafter_error_diagram.png")
